name: CoQ10 (Ubiquinone)
description: A cellular energy molecule that acts as a powerful antioxidant to protect skin from oxidative stress and aging.
scientificSummary: CoQ10 levels in skin decline naturally with age. Topical application replenishes the antioxidant network in the dermal layers.
mechanismOfAction: Regenerates vitamin E and neutralizes reactive oxygen species in both hydrophilic and lipophilic environments of the skin.

seo.title: CoQ10 (Ubiquinone) - Cellular Antioxidant | Dew Theory
seo.description: Explore how CoQ10 powers cellular energy and shields skin from oxidative aging.
